title: Source Snapshots
subtitle: generated file diff layer
description: Generated file snapshot layer for asset refresh. Tracks added, changed, and deleted source files under tmp so Asset Index can skip unchanged rebuilds and later support incremental row updates.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Source Snapshots contract: generated snapshot location, tracked files, refresh consumers, and boundary with preview refresh.

children.title: snapshots.mjs
children.description: Builds source file snapshots, compact signatures, persisted generated snapshots, and added/changed/deleted diffs for asset refresh.
